prompt: Use the uploaded reference image as the identity source. Create a high-end streetwear campaign poster with the same person captured mid-air in a dynamic floating pose. Clean studio background with soft white to light grey gradient. Subject wears a monochrome oversized sweatshirt, matching sneakers, and translucent loose pants. Add dramatic colored smoke clouds swirling around the body, blending with the outfit tone. Strong fashion editorial lighting, sharp details, premium advertisement style, centered composition. Behind the subject, place giant bold 3D block letters spelling “[BRAND NAME]” across the background instead of any other text, matching the outfit color. Crisp shadows, glossy finish, modern luxury sportswear aesthetic, highly detailed, poster quality.
